name: CTI-Expert — OSINT investigation import
description: Imports the output of CTI-Expert (github.com/7onez/cti-expert, an OSINT/CTI-analyst skill) into XORCISM's threat-intel exchange. Parses either a STIX 2.1 bundle export (indicators / observed-data) OR a cti-expert case JSON ({target, findings, observables, exposureScore}) — each becomes an INTELEXCHANGE intel item (IOC value as reference, A–F reliability / severity carried in tags). The native /cti-expert cockpit re-runs the same investigation with the LOCAL AI; this connector ingests cases produced by the upstream Claude-Code skill. Offline: pass `file`, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A cti-expert STIX 2.1 bundle or case JSON export to parse
